composition.lld_notes: Django configured programmatically (settings.configure) in wsgi.py — INSTALLED_APPS=[], MIDDLEWARE=[], DATABASES={}, SILENCED_SYSTEM_CHECKS=['*'], ROOT_URLCONF='freelancer_app.wsgi'. Framework carried from build-record lld_notes ('Framework: Django', ADR-0002), not re-picked. WSGI entry freelancer_app.wsgi.application = get_wsgi_application(). Routing (MPA/SSR, ADR-0004): GET / -> _view_entry_page (AC1: entry page, non-empty HTML; uses session_gate.check via CT8 seam to inspect session cookie); GET /auth/login -> _view_auth_login (AC5 step 1: redirect 302 to Google OAuth 2.0 authorization URL, ADR-0005); GET /auth/callback -> _view_auth_callback_safe (AC5 step 2: extracts code from QUERY_STRING, calls identity_auth.oauth_provider.exchange_code(code) — external seam patched by frozen mock_oauth_provider, then calls oauth_callback.handle_callback(provider, provider_id, profile_ref) — C2->C1 CT1 seam — then sets Set-Cookie: session=<provider_id> and redirects 302 to /; CT1:store-unavailable (ConnectionError) caught: no session cookie, redirect to /auth/login?error=store_unavailable). oauth_provider.py is the external Google OAuth 2.0 adapter seam module the frozen conftest mock_oauth_provider patches via monkeypatch.setattr('freelancer_app.identity_auth.oauth_provider', mock). Synchronous request handling, no async/queue (INV6). Later-slice deps C3/C4/C5 (CT9/CT10/CT11) not wired — stay mocked via frozen conftest.

mock_swaps.detail: session_gate.check(request.COOKIES) called in _view_entry_page; both C6 (Web Ingress, status:green) and C2 (Identity & Auth, status:green) are on-path — real callables wired. session_checker.check_session is the real implementation (returns None for absent/expired cookies).

oauth_callback.handle_callback calls data_store.identity_record_store.save_identity at call time; both C2 (Identity & Auth, status:green) and C1 (Data Store, status:green) are on-path — real callables wired. In-memory dict store at contract layer; ConnectionError propagates from save_identity on CT1:store-unavailable.

mocks_retained.reason: External system — not a modeled component, no CT* covers this seam (flows.json step external:true, via:null). Accessed via identity_auth.oauth_provider.exchange_code() seam; frozen conftest mock_oauth_provider patches freelancer_app.identity_auth.oauth_provider at test time. Real Google OAuth credentials not available at walking-skeleton level.

C3 not in walking-skeleton build set (status:mocked in build plan). Frozen conftest mock_ct9_project_management patches freelancer_app.project_management.request_handler. Not wired here — later-slice dep.
C4 not in walking-skeleton build set (status:mocked in build plan). Frozen conftest mock_ct10_time_logging patches freelancer_app.time_logging.request_handler. Not wired here — later-slice dep.
C5 not in walking-skeleton build set (status:mocked in build plan). Frozen conftest mock_ct11_invoice_export patches freelancer_app.invoice_export.request_handler. Not wired here — later-slice dep.

assertions.trace: on success: HttpResponseRedirect('/') -> status 302 in allowed set
response.set_cookie('session', value=provider_id) sets Set-Cookie: session=uid-f1-happy; ... -> 'session' in set_cookie.lower() = True; AND callback_status=302 in (302,303) also satisfies OR branch

failure.arrives_at: OAuth callback cannot persist the identity record; no authenticated session is established; Web Ingress redirects the browser to the login entry point with an error

assertions.trace: save_identity raises ConnectionError; handle_callback propagates; _view_auth_callback raises; _view_auth_callback_safe catches ConnectionError -> HttpResponseRedirect('/auth/login?error=store_unavailable') calls start_response
HttpResponseRedirect has no Set-Cookie header -> set_cookie='' -> 'session' not in ''.lower() = True -> condition satisfied

assertions.assert: if status in (301,302,303,307,308): 'login' or 'auth' or 'error' in location.lower()
assertions.trace: callback_status=302 in redirect set; Location='/auth/login?error=store_unavailable' -> 'auth' in location.lower()=True AND 'login' in location.lower()=True -> assertion satisfied

verification.static_trace_notes: No Python interpreter in build harness (§5.7, Rule 6). Static trace of all flow test assertions: GET / -> _view_entry_page -> HttpResponse(200, body=non-empty HTML) satisfies AC1 (response_started, status<400, len(body)>0). GET /auth/login -> _view_auth_login -> HttpResponseRedirect(302) satisfies AC5 step 1 (response produced, status=302 in allowed set). GET /auth/callback?code=test-oauth-code -> identity_auth.oauth_provider.exchange_code('test-oauth-code') calls mock (monkeypatch.setattr('freelancer_app.identity_auth.oauth_provider', mock) -> identity_auth.oauth_provider is mock -> mock.exchange_code returns {'provider':'google','provider_id':'uid-f1-happy','profile':{...}}) -> oauth_callback.handle_callback('google','uid-f1-happy',{'email':'freelancer@example.com'}) -> data_store.identity_record_store.save_identity(...) -> in-memory dict store -> returns record -> response.set_cookie('session','uid-f1-happy') + HttpResponseRedirect('/') satisfies AC5 step 2 (callback_status=302, Set-Cookie: session=uid-f1-happy). Failure path: patch(save_identity, side_effect=ConnectionError) -> handle_callback propagates ConnectionError -> _view_auth_callback raises -> _view_auth_callback_safe catches -> HttpResponseRedirect('/auth/login?error=store_unavailable') -> no Set-Cookie -> callback_status=302, Location contains 'auth'/'login' -> all failure assertions satisfied. Authoritative execution owed to VERIFY-OUTPUT.

commits.message: INTEGRATE F1: compose C6->C2->C1 walking skeleton — WSGI app (Django) + OAuth callback routing + oauth_provider seam
